name: Yellow Cake
recipeIngredient: Liquid sweetener equivalent to 1/4 cup sugar
1/2 cup liquid egg substitute (at room temperature)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the dry ingredients (cake flour, baking soda, and baking powder) until well combined.
2. In a separate bowl or measuring cup, whisk together 3/4 cup water (room temperature), vegetable oil, liquid sweetener equivalent to 1/4 cup sugar, vanilla extract, and liquid egg substitute until smooth.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring with a fork until just combined.
4. Fold in the margarine using a spatula or whisk until incorporated into the batter.
5. Pour the batter evenly into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes at 375°F (190°C), or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean and the cake pulls away from the sides of the pan.
7. Allow the cake to cool to room temperature before cutting it into 4 x 4 inch pieces, yielding 16 equal servings.
Food Exchange:
1 BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 143
CHO: 17g
PRO: 2g
FAT: 7g
Note: For low-sodium diets, use low-sodium baking powder and salt-free margarine.
